articles.title: Antarctica retreat study signals future ice loss
articles.summary: The ice along Antarctica’s ‘grounding lines’ has been largely stable over the past 30 years – but ice has retreated by more than 40 km in some areas, a new study based on satellite data finds.

articles.title: Self-repairing spacecraft could change future missions
Smoke Rises Over Big Cypress National Preserve
articles.summary: The National fire has burned tens of thousands of acres within the Florida preserve, fueled by vegetation dried by prolonged drought and killed by recent frost.

articles.title: Deutsche Telekom aims to bring Starlink Mobile V2 to Europe in 2028
articles.summary:
Deutsche Telekom plans to deliver Europe’s first direct-to-smartphone services via upgraded Starlink satellites in 2028, aiming to use MSS spectrum to bring 5G speeds to remote areas across 10 countries.
The post Deutsche Telekom aims to bring Starlink Mobile V2 to Europe in 2028 appeared first on SpaceNews.
